scripts.dev:start: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- sh -c 'bun run dev:ng serve --port "$APP_HOST_PORT"'
scripts.build:watch: NG_BUILD_PARTIAL_SSR=1 bun run dev:ng build --watch --configuration development
scripts.test:e2e: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=local-chrome-baseline
scripts.test:e2e:ui: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --ui
scripts.test:e2e:integration: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=local-chrome-integration --project=docs-integration
scripts.test:e2e:live-esncard: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/testing/runtime-preflight.ts esncard-release && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test tests/specs/profile/user-profile-live-esncard.spec.ts --project=local-chrome-live-esncard --grep '@needs-live-esncard'
scripts.test:e2e:live-esncard:release: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/testing/runtime-preflight.ts esncard-release && bun run test:unit:esncard-provider-error && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test tests/specs/profile/user-profile-live-esncard.spec.ts --project=local-chrome-live-esncard --grep '@needs-live-esncard' --trace=off --reporter=github,dot,./tests/support/reporters/complete-playwright-run-reporter.ts
scripts.test:e2e:docs: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=docs-baseline
scripts.test:e2e:docs:publish: bun run env:runtime && DOCS_OUT_DIR=/Users/hedde/code/evorto-pages/apps/documentation/src/app/docs DOCS_IMG_OUT_DIR=/Users/hedde/code/evorto-pages/apps/documentation/public/docs dotenv -c dev -- playwright test --project=docs-baseline
scripts.db:push: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- drizzle-kit push --force
scripts.db:studio: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- drizzle-kit studio
scripts.db:reset: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- drizzle-kit push --force && dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/database.ts
scripts.docker:check: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- bun helpers/testing/runtime-preflight.ts docker
scripts.docker:ps: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose ps
scripts.docker:stop: bun run env:runtime && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down --timeout 60 --remove-orphans
scripts.docker:resume: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- bash helpers/testing/docker-resume.sh
scripts.docker:start: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down --timeout 60 --remove-orphans && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build -d
scripts.docker:start:watch: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down --timeout 60 --remove-orphans && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build -w
scripts.docker:start:foreground: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose down --timeout 60 --remove-orphans && dotenv -c dev -- docker compose up --build
scripts.docker:webserver: bun run docker:check && dotenv -c dev -- bash helpers/testing/docker-webserver.sh
scripts.deps:update:drizzle: bun add drizzle-orm@rc && bun add -D drizzle-seed@rc drizzle-kit@rc
scripts.ops:sentry:sourcemaps: sentry-cli sourcemaps inject --org lukas-heddendorp --project evorto ./dist && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --org lukas-heddendorp --project evorto ./dist
